subject: docs: fix stale click-to-close references, clarify print CSS for split modals
body:
HISTORY.md and SESSION_NOTES.md referenced click-to-close behavior that
was removed in the previous commit. Updated to reflect the actual state:
backdrops have no click handlers (preserves original modal behavior).

Added clarifying comment to the print CSS .fixed.inset-0 selector
explaining that modals now have two adjacent siblings matching the
selector (backdrop + modal container), and the empty backdrop collapses
harmlessly.

Tags: docs, z-index
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: z-index-scale
Semver: patch
